review_text:
Absolutely will return to Peterborough and stay again at Great Ocean Tourist Park.
Dean and Sarah made us feel welcomed and were great resources to find local gems.💎
The Park is well situated to go for walks to catch the sunrise over the river with the abundance of birdlife.
Short drives in the car reveal coastal wonders, or in land to small country towns, and organic Shultz  dairy.
This cabin had everything. Not only a  rice cooker but cling wrap. Great price, very clean, well presented, highly recommend
Clean and welcoming

I found this park by chance on Google Maps. If you want a place very quiet but in a good position driving the great ocean road, this one is perfect.
It’s not so big but it has everything you need (amenities, laundry, camp kitchen with bbq, dump point, powered and unpowered sites, cabins).
We did a late check-in ‘cause we were driving and I called the reception and they left for us a paper on the front door of the reception with all the indications and map of the camp. Absolutely recommended!

Convenient location, close to the 12 apostles and town with shops and restaurants.
Easy check in and check out.
Cabin booked via online booking site, pretty much same as the photos. Got everything you need in the kitchen if you would like to do some cooking.
Wifi signal can be weak and unstable sometimes.
In the perfect position to go sightseeing along the great Ocean road

A great place if you're looking for peace & tranquility on the GOR.
So close to everything and just a short walk to the beach.
Highly recommended if your looking to relax and enjoy this beautiful part of our country.🌊🐚

Bien placé sur la Great Ocean Road  au bord de l'eau avec la plage à proximité c'est idéal.
Les sanitaires sont propres et en bon état mais mériterais une rénovation. Si vous avez besoin d'un bon wifi n'hésitez pas il est excellant par contre le prix pour un camping car avec electricté vous coûtera 50 Dollar un peu élevé par rapport à la moyenne
Great little caravan park. Friendly service. Clean, well equipped facilities.
We camped there. Good check-in. Great sheltered camp site. Clean facilities.

I love Peterborough because it’s a quiet but lovely spot along the great ocean road with a wonderful scenic lookout and this gem of a caravan park just down the road. Stayed here in my converted van and the lovely hostess gave me a scenic spot by the river. Clean facilities and very quiet here. Wish I could stay forever.

One of my favourite spots that I keep coming back too this is such a cozy spot to stay. The caravan park is a family run business and they are absolutely amazing people. The caravan park itself is beautiful it’s right next to the water and only a short walk to the beach. Great spot for families or even short term camping they have all the facilities you need I highly recommend this place.

Prachtige lokatie, bij de rivier waar langs je kunt lopen naar de zee.
Sanitair is schoon en netjes.
Inchecken ging eenvoudig.
Mooie redelijk ruime plek met water en elektriciteit.
Older style caravan park but well maintained. We enjoyed our stay on one of the river spots.
Great location, hot showers, clean amenities, great camp kitchen. Soft grass tent sites, some very well wind protected.

The Great Ocean Road Tourist Park in Peterborough.|This is a G'Day Park, the reasons why we chose it.|The park is close to town, but not much happening there.|It is close to Port Campbell, where we found excellent Fish and Chips.|Our cabin was good, clean and comfortable.|The Manager was friendly - thank you.|We had a great stay.|Thank you.
We stay here for 2 night. They dont bother fixing the WiFi. Very cold cabins. We requested couple of times to fix the WiFi and dont want to give us any discount.
Muy hermoso el lugar 😍

It's a great location.  Just by the sea. Rioms were a bit smaller but enough for 4 people. It's got a separate family area with bbq, games room etc. We loved our stay. Dean and Sarah were very helpful when I thought I lost my key.
Good small room
Great caravan park to explore from , will be back
Great place to stay. Central to where we wanted to travel to along the Great Ocean Rd.

Super friendly staff. Clean amenities and well kept grounds.  Good for kids, families and couples. Everything you need if you forgot anything is within 500 meters.

Safe kids beach, good fishing and tourist attractions virtually on your doorstep

Many permanent units here. We have one of a few actually on the water.  Bathroom facilities are good. Camp kitchen is truly excellent with three rooms, two large TV with couches, two electric barbecues and one large gas barbecue.

We only stayed the one night but this place ticked all our boxes. The amenities block was clean which is a must. The kids enjoyed the games room and jumping pillow. |Management were friendly when we arrived and suggested a number of places for sightseeing.

So unfriendly

Refused to come out of house because we were out of hours. Couldnt book online. Turned us away around dinner at night. Such concern for community safety. Certainly not a safe haven.

Great tourism approach…not.
We stayed 4 nights on a powered site. Loved it. Quiet this time of year. Great location. Great pub across the road. Pretty beach.

Small caravan park ideally located on the Great ocean road, right after London Bridge and before Bay of Martyrs.

Kids playground is quite small (only a swing and the jumping mattress was deflated when we arrived).

Overall I guess appreciation might vary depending on the spot you are in. We were facing amenities and our spot was not flat so we had to move the camper and before going to sleep.

Very clean facilities and neat site, we camped out powered sites along the river 13pp.
Everything felt easy going, the booking process to service onsite was flawless. Free hire of fire pit, firewood was $15 per 12 KG. Site was very well priced. Highly recommend
Best little caravanpark i have ever been the friendliest people in the world just loved it there

Simply and lovely park. Nothing fancy, but quiet and all the amenities were really, really clean. Camp kitchen, simple games room for kids. Right on the river near the mouth. Right in town. Friendly staff.
Just spent a night at Port Campbell and I thought Peterborough was much nicer and better priced. Can't wait to return!
All good 👍 and 🍾 💓 👌 great time
Cabin is very small and could be better.

Awesome park. We took the camper and stayed Melbourne cup weekend
Right ob the river. Very neat and tidy with great amenities and great staff. Very friendly and helpful. Highly recommend this park.
Quiet area,  comfortable accommodation
This is quiet and beautiful place to stay, we only stayed here for one night but everything was great. Highly recommended!
What a great park clean & great location
Spectacular scenery and well worth stopping for a look.

Beautiful little caravan park on the river at Portland with the beach across the road. Easy walk to shops and areas of interest. Wide roads, level sites, easy to manoeuvre the van. Well kept grounds. Amenities spotless. Large games room and outdoor basketball court. Indoor/outdoor camp kitchen with fireplace. Staff really friendly. Peterborough has only a general store and a takeaway/cafe. It's an ideal spot with Bay of Islands 5 mins one way and Gibson Steps and 12 Apostles 10-15 minutes the other. There is also a cliff top walk that takes you along from Bay of Martyrs to Bay of Islands. This area is well worth a visit and I would recommend to base yourself at this van park

Great park. Very clean, tidy and well run. Management are friendly and caring.
We camped during the week in the winter and had a whole strip of sites to ourselves.
The fire pits that management supplied were great, we wheeled it over and were able to set it up where it best suited us.
We were able to have our little dog on a lead.
Close to the beach and other beautiful attractions.
Bath matts supplied at the shower block was a nice touch.
Good value for a powered site at a decent park.
Thanks for having us.
Nice park, go over to the Inn and get the best chicken parmy ever,

What a lovely place to visit. We were near the amenities which was handy as it was raining when we arrived . The only downer is the smell from the water but that's out of the parks control. Dean was very helpful and gave us really good information regarding where to visit. We have our dog so very limited.

Stayed 2 nights. Very clean caravan park. Amenities are spotless and grounds are very well maintained. I would stay here again but with the G'day parks rewards it was still more expensive than NRMA parks at Port Campbell 12 kilometres east which is also a nice clean caravan park.

It was ideal for us coming to the Great Ocean Road from the west. It’s a few kms from the London Bridge viewpoint etc.
The facilities are pretty good and the showers are hot. What more could you need!
Peaceful, remote very quiet.

In cv and next door a mobile camper puts up outside zip toilet within 30 mins smell disgusting around from our door choice. Otherwise amazing until this episode
Toilets r available in 3mins not happy
Great little place, dog friendly and owners are very helpful and friendly, offers powered and unpowered sites for all forms of camping

A nice quiet place to stay - quiet and not overcrowded. 2 BR spa cabin was spacious and reasonably equiped. Lounge seating is limited  to a two seater lounge. If fully occupied there is not enough seating for everyone except on dining chairs. Cleanliness could be improved - bathroom and floors. Reception staff were very welcoming and helpful. Peterborough is a lovely little village - local shop owners are very friendly and kind.
Large clean camp kitchen and games room. Friendly staff and great camping spot on lush grass and trees for shade.
Very neat , clean park
Great get away tourist park.
Very lovely place with great amenities for the kids. I would definitely go back again if I was heading that way.

Super accommodating and very welcoming not only to be park but to the town. Amazing facilities, everything pristine. Best price we have gotten along the great ocean road too. Enjoyed our time so much would 1000000% recommend !!!

Great spot away from the hustle and bustle of the tourist trap yet on the door step of all the sights. We had a beautiful spot down by the river it was windy but sheltered. Follow us Sweet-Az-RV'n on YouTube 🤠🤙

Camping idéalement situé au milieu de la Great Océan Road... les sanitaires et les communs sont propres et fonctionnels... parfait pour faire une pause d'une nuit ou pour rayonner sur les points de vue alentours. Pour le reste, Peterborough est une toute petite ville donc... peu d'activité.
Great park but not much of a playground for the children, only 2 swings

Many thanks for your welcome, your kindness
And above all thank you Sarah, for my Christmas present 🥰😍
Very friendly staff and very clean amenities, gave us the choice of sites because of the predicted weather

Friendly staff. Good size park. Clean amenities. Close to the beach, short walk to the little general store. We made it base so we could do the great ocean drive without taking the caravan which with all the hills and tight corner's was the right thing for us.
Excellent holiday cabin. Clean and comfortable. All amenities provided with clear institution and working fine. Highly recommended.

Nice location for a tourist park, just at the cusp of a river let and the ocean.

One can rent a cottage or bring their own Caravan and plug in water and electricity at the given slots.

The mornings are just magical here, the end shores of the Australian peninsula.

One can reach here through 'The Great Ocean Road', and visit 'The Seven Apostles' on the way.

A must do in Australia!
Loved it here
Great camping site, close to tourists attractions and staff was very friendly.
The staff were very kind when they saw me playing at the basket ball court and they wanted to lend me a real basket ball
Long trip but the views are worthy
